Typo - For correct transliteration. Especially to match "Vaidehī" ! Otherwise the father is being modified with "sloppy" spelling !  Please make this Global correction: "Nishadha" —> "Niṣāda" !
Typo – Please note that all other definitions end with "period". This correction is simply following the standard!
Typo – Please note this correction follows the SHS listing of this very word!
Typo – Please note this correction follows the possible intended PLURAL declension (to match the plural inhabitants)!

Typo – This magnificent, highly agglutinated compound from Jayadeva’s Gītagovinda has been mangled by digitization/typesetting glitches dropping crucial diacritics: LB virahini: This is incorrect. It must be virahiṇī. It requires the retroflex ṇ (triggered by the 'r' in viraha) and the long ī to correctly form the feminine stem denoting "a separated woman." LB ketaki: This is incorrect. The standard botanical term here should be spelled with a long vowel as ketakī before joining with danturitāśe.
